briefdescription.para: Set species names that this process handles.

detaileddescription.para: Get required meteorological fields for this process
Override this method in concrete processes to specify which met fields are needed. The framework will only allocate the fields that are required.

briefdescription.para: Get required diagnostic fields for this process.

detaileddescription.para: Override this method in concrete processes to specify which diagnostic fields should be created and made available.

briefdescription.para: Check if process is ready to run.

detaileddescription.para: This method should be called during process initialization to register all diagnostics that the process will produce.

briefdescription.para: Update diagnostic values for this process.

detaileddescription.para: This method should be called during process execution to update diagnostic field values with current data from the process.

memberdef.argsstring: (this, registry, field_name, description, units, field_type, process_name, dimensions, diagnostic_species, diagnostic_species_id, rc)
memberdef.name: register_diagnostic_field

briefdescription.para: Utility to register a single diagnostic field with create, initialize, and register steps.

detaileddescription.para: This utility method encapsulates the common pattern of creating a diagnostic field, initializing its data storage, and registering it with the diagnostic registry. This eliminates code duplication in process-specific diagnostic registration routines.

parameterdescription.para: Diagnostic registry to register the field with
Name of the process registering the field
Array dimensions for data storage [nx, ny] or [nx, ny, nz]
Optional array of species names for diagnostics
Optional array of species indices for diagnostics

briefdescription.para: Apply emission scaling factors to emission arrays.

detaileddescription.para: This utility method applies scaling factors to emission fluxes for sensitivity studies or emission inventory adjustments.

this
ProcessInterface instance
Apply emission scaling factors (deprecated - placeholder implementation)

This method is deprecated as EmisState_Mod has been removed in favor of the new DiagnosticManager system. Processes should handle emissions through their own state management or direct chemical state modification.

briefdescription.para: Accumulate emissions from process calculations (deprecated - placeholder implementation)

detaileddescription.para: This method is deprecated as EmisState_Mod has been removed in favor of the new DiagnosticManager system. Processes should handle emissions through direct chemical state modification.

parameterdescription.para: Mapping from process species to global species indices

briefdescription.para: Apply tendencies to chemical species concentrations.

detaileddescription.para: This utility method applies calculated tendencies (rates of change) to chemical species concentrations using a specified integration method.

briefdescription.para: Check mass conservation for process calculations.

detaileddescription.para: This utility method checks whether mass is conserved during process calculations, useful for debugging and validation.

briefdescription.para: Validate that required chemical species are available.

detaileddescription.para: This utility method checks whether all species required by a process are available in the chemical mechanism.
This method validates that physical variables are within reasonable ranges to catch numerical errors, unphysical values, or model instabilities. Uses StateManager's internal validation capabilities.

parameterdescription.para: Return code (CC_SUCCESS if all values valid, CC_FAILURE if errors found)

memberdef.argsstring: (this, values, from_units, to_units, molecular_weight, temperature, pressure, rc)
memberdef.name: convert_concentration_units

briefdescription.para: Convert concentration units between different unit systems.

detaileddescription.para: This utility converts concentration values between common atmospheric chemistry units such as molec/cm³, ppbv, ppmv, µg/m³, etc.

parameterdescription.para: Array of concentration values to convert

briefdescription.para: Convert flux units between different unit systems.

detaileddescription.para: This utility converts emission flux values between common units such as kg/m²/s, molec/cm²/s, molecules/m²/s, etc.

parameterdescription.para: Array of flux values to convert

briefdescription.para: Calculate column integrals of species concentrations.

detaileddescription.para: This utility calculates vertical column integrals (e.g., column density) from 3D concentration fields.

briefdescription.para: Check if process supports column-based processing.
Abstract base class for all atmospheric processes.

detaileddescription.para: This abstract type defines the interface that all atmospheric processes must implement, following the exact structure from PROCESS_ARCHITECTURE_GUIDE.md
